visual_base.visual_narrative_log: (1) A female creator with long brown hair and a white t-shirt stands in a brightly lit indoor living room. She holds two toy boxes: a red Coca-Cola branded one and a white one with a pink Labubu character. She looks excited, her mouth wide open in surprise, and gestures animatedly while holding the boxes close to the camera. (2) A digital screen recording of a shopping application interface is displayed, showing a variety of Labubu keychain plushies listed with prices in Korean Won. The user interface features white backgrounds with clear product photography and brand logos like POPMART visible at the top. (3) The creator is back on screen, focusing on the white box. She turns the box to show a specific QR code printed on the side to the viewers. She uses her fingers to point at the details on the packaging before carefully opening the top flap of the cardboard box. (4) She reaches into the box and pulls out a white fabric drawstring bag with colorful strings. From the bag, she reveals a teal-colored, furry Labubu plush with large green eyes. She holds the toy close to the camera lens to show its facial features, paw details, and the back of its head. (5) A small white dog jumps into the frame from the bottom, attempting to play with the new toy. The creator moves the plush around while continuing to examine it. The video briefly transitions to a grayscale filter as she looks closely at the toy's face, appearing skeptical. (6) The creator places the teal plush on a wooden table, attempting to make it stand upright. However, the toy repeatedly tips over and falls onto its face or side. She reacts with a humorous expression, comparing the toy's slightly asymmetrical face to her own face. (7) Moving on to the second item, she picks up the red Coca-Cola branded box. She opens it and displays a collectible card depicting a secret character. She then unboxes a white furry Labubu wearing a branded red hoodie and holding a miniature soda bottle, showing another QR code on the box. (8) In the final segment, she holds both the teal and the white Coca-Cola Labubu plushies side-by-side in front of her face. A POPMART logo graphic is overlaid on the screen as she addresses the camera directly, asking her audience for their opinion on whether the items are genuine.
visual_base.text_narrative_log: (1) [Subtitle]: POV 第一次買拉布布確定是正貨嗎？. [Subtitle]: 在韓國買到LABUBU！. [Logo]: @602avenue. (2) [Variety]: 怎麼辦😍. (3) [Subtitle]: 最近在看韓國購物APP平台時. (4) [Subtitle]: 發現了！. (5) [Subtitle]: 寫說「正品」. (6) [Subtitle]: 而且販售店家名稱也是... POPMART. (7) [Logo]: 팝마트 POPMART. (8) [Subtitle]: 大家幫我一起看看🥺. (9) [Variety]: （第一次買LABUBU的人）. (10) [Subtitle]: 有QR. (11) [Subtitle]: 那我打開喔. (12) [Variety]: （期待）. (13) [Subtitle]: 好可愛❤️. (14) [Subtitle]: 所以是正貨嗎？. (15) [Variety]: （大家幫我看看XD）. (16) [Subtitle]: 有嗎？. (17) [Subtitle]: 感覺這方向被壓到了. (18) [Variety]: （還在研究中）. (19) [Subtitle]: 她的臉比我還歪欸哈哈哈. (20) [Subtitle]: 反正我喜歡綠色！喜歡！. (21) [Variety]: （還沒結束）. (22) [Subtitle]: 不是應該要站得住嗎？. (23) [Variety]: （一直倒下去）. (24) [Subtitle]: 這是秘密款嗎？. (25) [Subtitle]: 喔為什麼這麼大？. (26) [Subtitle]: 其實有這些選項. (27) [Subtitle]: 啊~~~~~. (28) [Subtitle]: 不是Secret. (29) [Subtitle]: 但是蠻可愛的啦. (30) [Subtitle]: 真的是正品嗎？. (31) [Subtitle]: 這邊有驗證的QR碼. (32) [Subtitle]: 這個也超級可愛呢~. (33) [Subtitle]: 這隻的毛摸起來不一樣欸. (34) [Subtitle]: 而且這隻的臉不會那麼歪欸. (35) [Subtitle]: 這是正貨嗎？大家可以幫我看看. [Logo]: POPMART.

visual_human_presence.countingEvidence: 1 female creator as the main host
visual_human_presence.mainCharacterDescription: A young woman with long brown hair, wearing a white oversized t-shirt

visual_scene_and_style.backgroundDescribe: A living room with a blue sofa, a white floor mat, a pedestal fan, and a coffee table

audio_base.audio_narrative_log: (1) A high-pitched female voice speaks quickly with high arousal and energetic prosody, expressing extreme surprise and excitement in a mix of Mandarin and Korean. A cheerful, medium-tempo background music track featuring acoustic guitar strumming and a light drum beat plays at a moderate volume. (2) The audible rustling of cardboard being folded and plastic packaging being manipulated occurs as the creator unboxes the first item. A sharp, digital "pop" sound effect marks a jump cut. Her voice remains consistently energetic, shifting into a questioning tone as she analyzes the toy's physical quality. (3) Short, stylized "whoosh" and "ding" post-production sound effects are synchronized with the appearance of on-screen text overlays and transitions. The background music maintains its steady rhythmic pace. The female speaker's voice shows high pitch variability and frequent rising intonations as she expresses her thoughts. (4) A soft, muffled "thud" is heard as the plush toy makes contact with the table surface several times. The creator emits a short burst of melodic laughter and continues her narration with a humorous, lighthearted tone. The dog's presence is marked by faint sounds of movement and light fabric friction. (5) More crisp cardboard unboxing sounds and the sound of items being pulled from a box are heard as the second red package is opened. The speaker continues her fast-paced delivery, focusing her vocal intensity on the details of the second toy. The upbeat acoustic background music carries through to the end.

narrative_and_purpose.narrativeStructure: List-based: Hook -> Unboxing Item 1 -> Evaluation -> Unboxing Item 2 -> Conclusion/Call for help
narrative_and_purpose.mainPurpose: A vlog documenting the unboxing of Labubu blind boxes purchased from a Korean shopping app, with the creator questioning their authenticity and seeking verification from viewers due to minor physical defects observed in the products.

endorsement_analysis.endorsementCues: The creator expresses genuine doubt about the authenticity of the items and asks for advice from her audience rather than promoting the platform.

high_inference.freeDescribe: The video uses typical social media editing styles with high text density and frequent sound effects to maintain engagement. The presence of a pet and the domestic setting add a casual, authentic feel to the review.
